functions.title: Guide Book #31
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #31§r
§lIron Evaporator§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally§r: NO
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 30.0
•§lHardness§r: 3.0
•§lFlammable§r: NO

•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Iron Evaporator
•§lContainable with§r: Water, Snow, Ices, Lava, Milk, Mud, Rotten Flesh.
•The iron evaporator can dry out the contained substances in a few minutes.
•The water, milk, snow,
ice, or rotten flesh contained will dry out after 75 seconds §o§8(1:15)§r. While the lava contained will dry out after 150 seconds §o§8(2:30)§r.§’
